string.text: %c[0,150,150,150]Spectrum is a mysterious militarized group, considered a private military company (PMC). Their goals are unknown, and they acquire weapons from unknown sources. They are hostile to everyone. They possess armored vehicles (APCs) and helicopters. Their numbers are unknown. Among their fighters, there is a large number of professionals who have served in conflict zones around the world.\n\n%c[0,255,255,255]Recommended for: experienced players only.
